headline: Reklaim Credit Solutions Launches as the First Commercial Credit Rating Agency Built Specifically for the Legal Cannabis Industry
summary: Proprietary Neural Network Technology Built for the Cannabis Industry Delivers Credit Scores, Credit Limits, and Full Credit Reports, Bringing Long-Overdue Transparency to Trade CreditNEW YORK, March 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Reklaim Credit Solutions today announced its official launch as the first commercial credit rating agency built specifically for the legal cannabis industry, addressing one of the most persistent and costly structural challenges in cannabis commerce: the lack of reliable
